purpose: Fail-closed sentinel for the dlfcn replace boundary. While current_level remains L0/L1 interpose, dlfcn_abi.rs is permitted to delegate to host dlopen/dlsym/dlvsym/dlclose under documented host-backed interpose paths (bootstrap pass-through, host-handle round-tripping, RTLD_DEFAULT/RTLD_NEXT lookups). When a standalone replacement level (L2/L3) is claimed, every host-delegation call site must either be removed (replaced by a native loader) or carry an explicit `replace_mode_native_required` annotation that ships a native fallback. The sentinel inventories every host-delegation site, refuses standalone replacement promotion while any site is still annotated `interpose_only` or `host_handle_passthrough`, and detects any new unannotated host call appearing in dlfcn_abi.rs.
verification_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test dlfcn_replace_boundary_sentinel_test

host_callsites.guard: explicit RTLD_NEXT walk; no native equivalent yet
host_callsites.context_anchor: pub(crate) unsafe fn dlvsym_next(symbol: *const c_char, version: *const c_char) -> *mut c_void {
host_callsites.rationale: Versioned symbol lookup walks RTLD_NEXT via host resolver; native loader does not enumerate version chains.

host_callsites.context_anchor: unsafe fn host_dlsym(handle: *mut c_void, symbol: *const c_char) -> Option<*mut c_void> {
host_callsites.rationale: Helper called by host_handle delegation paths; will be removed once native dlsym lands.

host_callsites.guard: wrapper used by host-handle dlvsym delegation
host_callsites.rationale: Helper called only by host_handle dlvsym paths; will be removed once native dlvsym lands.

host_callsites.context_anchor: // During bootstrap, delegate to host dlopen for actual .so loading.
host_callsites.rationale: Bootstrap pass-through must stay until native loader is online; gated by bootstrap_passthrough_active().

host_callsites.context_anchor: // Bare SONAME search/dependency loading remains delegated while
host_callsites.rationale: Native dlopen would load ELF dependencies; until then host loader is required.

host_callsites.context_anchor: // Handle is from host dlopen — delegate to host dlsym.
host_callsites.rationale: Host handles obtained via host dlopen must round-trip back to host dlsym; only a native loader can replace this.

host_callsites.context_anchor: // Non-main-program handle during bootstrap: delegate to host dlclose.
host_callsites.rationale: Closes host-loaded handles during bootstrap; must remain until native loader replaces dlopen.

host_callsites.context_anchor: // Handle from host dlopen — delegate to host dlclose.
host_callsites.rationale: Host handles must close via host dlclose; replaced only by native loader.
